creator: olivier@freebsd.org
text:
There is a commit (only on net/bird for the time) that could fix it:

Author: olivier
Date: Sat Nov 10 23:02:45 UTC 2018
New revision: 484648
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/484648

Log:
  Fixes wrong LSA collision detection and add birdvty group

Does this modification suit to you?
